---
title: "ClaimBridge Monthly Claims Report"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)

monthly <- read_csv(here("output", "extracts", "monthly_claim_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Monthly Summary

```{r}
monthly |>
  mutate(service_month = format(as.Date(service_month), "%Y-%m")) |>
  knitr::kable()
```

## Paid Ratio Trend

```{r}
ggplot(monthly, aes(x = as.Date(service_month), y = paid_ratio, color = product_line)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Paid Ratio Trend",
    x = "Service Month",
    y = "Paid Ratio (%)",
    color = "Product Line"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  theme_minimal()

```
